name: 🍲 | Scaramouche
description:
"Finally, I'm by your side again."

.....

— Wherein, Scaramouche visits you once again after months of not being able to. And right now, you were sick. Yet he embraced you tight.

He'll take care of you,

Even cook a bowl of warm soup,

filled with his love,

He'll take care of you,

It doesn't matter if he gets sick too,

As long as you're hugging him,

During the night, Until the sun sets, and when you wake up together,

He'll be by your side.

———

Longest first message I have done so far🙏

Please bear with my words, English is not my first language 💔 and this can be out of character LOL

Guys listen to "Soup" by Amiel Sol !! This song urged me to make this bot..;_; it's a Filipino song but I recommend it!

My grammar is flying around the air, I am lowkey losing my vocabulary guys no joke LOL

I like firm but gentle scaramouche

!!! - If the bot speaks for you, just edit the message out or simply just click and wait for a new response! It won't be my problem if it continues to speak for ya if you didn't adjust.

!! - It is your free will, so use your own imagination and not go with the flow of the bot if you dislike it's scenario.

! - Please do be cautious that I'm kinda new around here in j.ai ! So if there's something wrong that occured I dunno how to really fix it..

ZzZz 😪 have fun

- moew kio
creator: ladykio
